Author: NalaPraline
Name: Zone
Changelog: Add Eclipse Horizon and Untamed partners, Glam Contest activity, update Discord button label.
Punchline: The official ZONE event companion plugin.
Description:
Zone is the all-in-one companion for ZONE events. Features a live DJ lineup, activity tracker, staff directory, Zone Vision HUD overlay, and midnight time lock.

Commands:
/zone - Open Zone
/zonevision - Toggle HUD overlay
